meta.title: Oxime Derivatives of Erythromycin: Inhibitors of Rous Sarcoma Virus Reverse Transcriptase Activity and Focus Formation

abstractHtml: 9-O-methyloxime erythromycin A and its analogue inhibited reverse transcriptase and blocked focus formation of Rous sarcoma virus. These chemicals inhibited neither DNA-dependent DNA polymerase nor DNA-dependent RNA polymerase from bacterial sources. However, they inhibited reverse transcriptase with an apparently different mechanism than that by rifamycin ABDP.
